description: Validate TLSNotary attestation cryptographic structure within a bundle
requires: native module (cd native && npm run build)

request.attestations: string[] (required) — serialized attestation JSONs from zktls.prove
request.expectedServerName: string (optional) — hostname all attestations must match
request.expectedArticleSha256: string (optional) — expected content hash across attestations

metadata.attestation_hashes: string[] — SHA-256 hashes of valid attestations
metadata.results: array — [{ index, valid, commitmentCount?, attestationSha256?, error? }]

error_output.error: string — 'native binding required — build native/ with: cd native && npm run build'
